Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And To Compel Further Responses And Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Lauren Ulrich's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories, and Request For Production of Documents granted, as follows:
1. Objections waived, except for attorney-client privilege and attorney work product privilege;
2. Defendant shall serve verified supplemental responses to interrogatories reflecting any additional information required to be disclosed due to the waiver of objections [exclusive of attorney-client and attorney work product privileges].
3. Defendant shall serve full, verified responses to Request for Production of Documents, in the manner required by statute, without objection [exclusive of attorney-client and attorney work product privileges].
4. All responses subject to this order shall be served within 10 days of the date of this Order.
5. Request for Sanctions denied. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
